routeA.day: This route passes through moderate-traffic lanes during daytime. Adequate footfall reduces risk significantly during daylight hours.
routeA.night: This route passes through 2 isolated stretches with limited lighting after 8 PM. 3 incidents reported in this corridor in recent months.

routeB.day: Market-facing route with full street lighting and active commercial areas. Consistently high foot traffic throughout the day.
routeB.night: Well-lit commercial corridor with active foot traffic until 10 PM. Recommended for evening travel. Safety infrastructure rated excellent.
